parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor User
participant "BileMo API" as API
database "BileMo Database" as DB

User -> API : 1 Authentication Request (email, plain password)
API -> DB : 2 Find user with matching email & password combination

alt invalid credentials
    DB --> API : 3 null
    API --> User : 4 JSON Authentication response: 401 Invalid credentials
else valid credentials
    DB --> API : 5 User object
    API --> User : 6 JSON Authentication Response: 200 JWT token
    User -> API : 7 Show products list (JWT token)
    API -> API : 8 Check route & query parameters are valid
    
    alt Route does not exist
        API --> User : 9 404 Route not found
    else Route found
        API -> API : 10 Security firewall: check token is valid & user permissions
        
        alt Access denied
            API -> User : 11 403 Forbidden
        else Token expired
            API -> User : 12 401 Unauthorized
        else Token valid & permission granted
            API -> DB : 13 Get products results
            DB --> API : 14 Results query response (Products object)
            API -> API : 15 Serialize(normalize+encode) results object to JSON
            API --> User : 16 Response 200 Serialized JSON results
        end
    end
end

@enduml
```
